predecessors.omega-network-2: introduced single global HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD (default 80) + observability log
predecessors.omega-network-3: analyzer recommends per-host thresholds from log distribution
predecessors.omega-network-3b: analyzer recreated/refined; manual env override gap identified

env_pattern.note: host name comes from probe candidate ($cand) which is the canonical ssh-config alias post-normalization (htz→hetzner happens later in pick_preferred_host).

log_format_change.before: ts \t host \t psi \t threshold \t outcome \t reason  (6 cols)
log_format_change.after: ts \t host \t psi \t threshold \t outcome \t reason \t src  (7 cols)
log_format_change.rationale: Operators reading /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log can now distinguish rows where a per-host override was active from rows under the global/default — critical for analyzer attribution.

unit_traces.expected: ACCEPT (would have been REJECT under default 80)
REJECT (would have been ACCEPT under default 80)

backward_compat.no_env_set: src=default80, threshold=80 — identical reject boundary to ω-network-2 baseline (8000 = 80*100).
backward_compat.log_consumers: TSV column count grew 6→7. Existing parsers that index by tab position 1-6 (ts/host/psi/thr/outcome/reason) continue to work; only column 7 (src) is new and ignorable.
backward_compat.comparison_constant: Removed hard-coded 8000 reject literal in favor of awk-derived _psi_threshold_int — no integer-vs-int*100 mismatch when default path is taken (80*100 = 8000).

recommendation.rationale: hetzner anima-ax102 has 128GB + 100GB+ headroom — saturating PSI events tolerable. ubu1/ubu2 (32GB + cgroup MemoryMax=20G) reach SIGTERM territory long before psi=80 — earlier reject prevents OOM kills observed 2026-04-25.
recommendation.rollout: Deploy after ω-network-3 analyzer accumulates >=200 PSI rows per host so the chosen thresholds are distribution-justified, not anecdotal.
recommendation.next_cycle_hooks: ω-network-5 candidate: analyzer auto-emits a sourceable env file (e.g. /tmp/hexa_remote_psi_thresholds.env) the operator can `. source` to apply suggested per-host values atomically.

constraints_honored.live_ssh: none — unit-trace harness simulates threshold lookup logic in /tmp without touching the network
constraints_honored.hexa_only: modification is to a tracked .sh foundational shell — sweeper-safe per session policy
